description: Global KPIs across the canonical Stage Execution scoring population.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH population AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM featurestore:merged_stage_execution_scores_v1 s
  WHERE s.formula_version = :formula_version
AND s.normalization_version = :normalization_version
),
lowest AS (
  SELECT name, stage_num_td, composite_score
  FROM population
  ORDER BY composite_score, name, stage_num_td
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(composite_score)::numeric, 1), 0) AS average_score,
  COUNT(*)::bigint AS stages_scored,
  COALESCE(MIN(composite_score), 0) AS lowest_score,
  COALESCE((SELECT name FROM lowest), '') AS lowest_well,
  COALESCE((SELECT stage_num_td FROM lowest), 0) AS lowest_stage
FROM population
) q
